Defines macros for unit conversions including frequency, data size, distance, and time.

# Purpose
This C header file defines a set of macros for unit conversions. It includes conversions for frequency from megahertz to hertz with `MHZ_TO_HZ`, and for data size from kibibytes, mebibytes, and exbibytes to bytes using `KiBYTES`, `MiBYTES`, and `EiBYTES`, respectively. It also defines constants for converting between different units of length, such as millimeters to meters (`MM_PER_METER`), meters to kilometers (`METERS_PER_KM`), and meters to miles (`METERS_PER_MILE`). Additionally, it provides time conversion constants, including microseconds to milliseconds (`US_PER_MS`), microseconds to seconds (`US_PER_S`), nanoseconds to seconds (`NS_PER_S`), picoseconds to nanoseconds (`PS_PER_NS`), picoseconds to microseconds (`PS_PER_US`), and picoseconds to seconds (`PS_PER_S`). These macros facilitate easy and consistent unit conversions throughout the codebase.
